title: Counting Loops - For Loops
description: Master the for loop for counted repetition - the most common loop pattern in programming.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: While loops are great when you don't know how many times to repeat. But when you know the exact count, use a for loop!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So for loops are better for 'repeat 10 times' scenarios?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! For loops handle the counting for you—no need to manually create and increment a counter!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: For loops use the range() function to generate numbers. You tell it how many numbers you want!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Does it start counting at 0 or 1?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Great question! Python starts counting at 0. So if you ask for 5 numbers, you get 0, 1, 2, 3, and 4!

objectives.description: Create a for loop with range: for i in range(5):

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! The variable 'i' automatically goes through each number.

phases.title: Using the Loop Variable
phases.description: Access the counter inside the loop

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Inside the loop, you can use the loop variable 'i'. It holds the current number! You can use it in your code.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So on the first iteration i is 0, then 1, then 2, etc.?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! The loop variable automatically increments each iteration.

objectives.description: Use the loop variable inside your for loop

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: The loop variable changes automatically each time!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: That's the beauty of for loops—automatic counting!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's farm with a for loop! Use it to automate your farming operations.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: What do I need to accomplish?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Harvest 5 wheat crops using a for loop! Plant them, grow them, then let the loop automate the harvesting. Much cleaner than repeating commands!

objectives.description: Create a for loop for farming operations
Harvest 5 wheat crops using a for loop

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: Five plots farmed with just a few lines of code!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: That's efficient programming! But for loops can do even more—let me show you advanced patterns!

rewards.description: Unlocked quest: Loop Mastery - Common Patterns
